'''Istic II''' was the irradiated, ore-rich [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was the second world in the [[Istic system/Legends|Istic system]], located within the [[Teraab sector/Legends|Teraab sector]]. With the permission of the local [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]], the native [[Istician]]s were hunted by [[Human/Legends|Human]] settlers as though they were vermin.

{{Planet-stub}}
